title: Iran Signals Iraqi Ships May Transit Strait of Hormuz as Shipping Traffic Rises
detail: Iran signaled that Iraqi ships may transit the Strait of Hormuz as shipping traffic through the waterway ticked upward, suggesting a selective easing of maritime pressure amid the ongoing conflict. The development marks a potential shift in Iran's blockade posture, which had seen commercial transits drop by approximately 95% since mines were laid in March 2026.

title: Planet Labs Imposes Imagery Blackout Over Iran Conflict Theater
detail: US commercial satellite imagery firm Planet Labs announced a blackout on war-zone imagery covering the Iran conflict theater, restricting public and media access to satellite photos of the conflict area. The move limits independent verification of strike damage, troop movements, and civilian infrastructure destruction at a critical juncture in the conflict.
